title: rotate fireworks api key
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Previous Fireworks key's account (`pollinations`) is suspended — Fireworks API returns HTTP 412 `PRECONDITION_FAILED` (billing/spending limit), breaking all Fireworks-routed text + embeddings models.
- Swaps in a verified working key across `dev`/`staging`/`prod` encrypted vars.
- New key tested against `api.fireworks.ai`: `/models` and a `deepseek-v4-flash` chat completion both return HTTP 200.
- Note: takes effect in production only after gen deploys from the `production` branch (auto-deploy pushes the new secret).

gist.headline: Unblocking the fireworks
gist.blurb: We've rotated our Fireworks API keys to get text and embedding models back up and running. The hive's connections are fully restored!
gist.summary: Rotated the Fireworks API key across all environments to resolve HTTP 412 errors and restore access to Fireworks-routed text and embedding models.
gist.impact: Users will see successful responses again when using Fireworks-backed models like deepseek-v4-flash.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot fixing a glowing firework rocket, while the Nomnom creature eats an old, broken golden key. Represents restoring the Fireworks API connection.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, fixing a glowing lime green (#ecf874) firework rocket. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats a broken golden key nearby. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
